data.title: 国际服「Tea Party's Summer Vacation Login Bonus!」登录奖励
data.summary: [Tea Party Summer Vacation Login Bonus!] The Tea Party Summer Vacation Login Bonus is here! 🏖️ Log i
data.body:
[Tea Party Summer Vacation Login Bonus!]

The Tea Party Summer Vacation Login Bonus is here! 🏖️

Log in to Blue Archive every day to receive not only Pyroxenes, but also a special furniture: Watermelon Crush Set, filled with summer memories~!

➡️ See details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3302501
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/n1ZsmUyVEW62Tx4VByrlggkdWxjPzY9y.png)
